description: Defense contractors and CMMC-regulated suppliers. Strongest posture across all dimensions due to mandatory CMMC v2.5 compliance + DFARS 252.204-7012; trade-off is slow change cadence.

citations.safe_score: DoD CMMC Assessment Process Guide 2024 + IBM Cost of a Data Breach 2025 public sector section.

citations.open_high: Same NVD/KEV intersection at HIGH severity.
citations.drift_events_per_week: Mandiant M-Trends 2025 government / defense section; lowest of any vertical due to change-control rigor.
citations.mean_time_to_remediate_days: IBM 2025 public sector + DoD DFARS 252.204-7012 72-hour reporting requirement.
citations.mfa_coverage_pct: Microsoft Digital Defense Report 2025 + DoD Zero Trust Strategy 2025 milestones.
citations.stale_account_pct: Verizon DBIR 2025 public sector + DoD Insider Threat Program 2024 metrics.
